response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and polyglot developer but falls significantly short of the mandatory requirements for this role. Specifically, the resume lacks the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform, as well as the necessary domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income.
strengths: Over 15 years of comprehensive software development experience across various modern languages and platforms.
Strong familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and modern software craftsmanship practices like TDD.
Some exposure to the financial sector through previous software development work at an investment tech company.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of professional C++ development experience, showing only a brief 6-month stint.
No evidence of specialized domain knowledge in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or institutional Capital Markets.
Lacks the required enterprise database experience with SQL Server or Oracle on the Windows platform.
